arrozconleche.title: MOM'S RECIPE
arrozconleche.description: Cheese, dulce de leche, jelly with red berry or pineapple chunks, condensed milk, and cookie.

arrozconleche.title: TRADITIONAL
arrozconleche.description: Dehydrated coconut, raisins, cinnamon, cheese, condensed milk, dulce de leche, and cookie.

arrozconleche.title: PACIFIC
arrozconleche.description: Caramelized coconut or dulce cortado jelly, cheese, condensed milk, dulce de leche, and cookie.

arrozconleche.title: CHEESE/DULCE DE LECHE
arrozconleche.description: Cheese, condensed milk, dulce de leche, and cookie.

arrozconleche.title: COFFEE FLAVOR
arrozconleche.description: Coffee-flavored rice pudding, dulce de leche, coffee delight, condensed milk, cheese, and cookie.

arrozconleche.title: ICE CREAM/CHEESE
arrozconleche.description: Ice cream of your choice, cheese, dulce de leche, and condensed milk.

obleas.title: EVOLUTION
obleas.description: Dulce de leche, whipped cream, jelly with red berry chunks, and cheese.

obleas.title: STRAWBERRY/BANANA
obleas.description: Strawberry, banana, whipped cream, dulce de leche, and condensed milk.

obleas.title: PEANUT WITH RAISINS
obleas.description: Cheese, raisins, crushed peanuts, dulce de leche, and whipped cream.

obleas.title: CHEESE/DULCE DE LECHE
obleas.description: Abundant dulce de leche with cheese and condensed milk.

obleas.title: PEANUT WITH COCONUT
obleas.description: Crushed peanuts, caramelized coconut, dulce de leche, and whipped cream.

obleas.title: NUTELLA
obleas.description: Hazelnut spread, whipped cream, chocolate sauce, chocolate chips, and cheese.

merengones.title: CONQUEROR
merengones.description: Meringue, peach, soursop, strawberry, mango, jelly with red berry chunks, whipped cream, condensed milk, chocolate sauce, and chocolate chips.

merengones.title: HUNTER
merengones.description: Meringue, ice cream, cheese, peach, soursop, strawberry, mango, jelly with red berry chunks, whipped cream, condensed milk, chocolate sauce, and chocolate chips.

fresasconcrema.title: STRAWBERRY
fresasconcrema.description: Strawberries, homemade jelly with strawberry chunks, house cream, dulce de leche, condensed milk, and whipped cream.

fresasconcrema.title: PASSION MANGO
fresasconcrema.description: Passion fruit, mango, house cream, dulce de leche, condensed milk, and whipped cream.

fresasconcrema.title: STRAWBERRY/BANANA
fresasconcrema.description: Strawberries, banana, jelly with strawberry chunks, house cream, dulce de leche, condensed milk, and whipped cream.

fresasconcrema.title: MANGO
fresasconcrema.description: Mango, house cream, dulce de leche, condensed milk, and whipped cream.

fresasconcrema.title: BANANA
fresasconcrema.description: Banana, jelly with strawberry chunks, house cream, dulce de leche, condensed milk, and whipped cream.

fresasconcrema.title: CHEESE/ICE CREAM
fresasconcrema.description: One or two fruits of your choice, mixed in homemade milk cream, accompanied by whipped cream, condensed milk, dulce de leche, ice cream, and cheese.

tortasybrownie.title: ICE CREAM BROWNIE
tortasybrownie.description: Brownie, one scoop of ice cream of your choice, chocolate sauce, condensed milk, cherry, and whipped cream.

tortasybrownie.title: TRES LECHES CAKE
tortasybrownie.description: Cake soaked in tres leches, accompanied by a homemade jelly with red berry chunks and a scoop of ice cream.

tortasybrownie.title: PASSION DESSERT
tortasybrownie.description: Passion fruit dessert accompanied by 1 scoop of ice cream (passion fruit or vanilla) and covered in a homemade passion fruit jelly.

lasaña.title: FOREST
lasaña.description: Sponge cake layers with cheese, bathed in house creams, a scoop of ice cream, and homemade jelly with red berry chunks.

lasaña.title: CARAMEL
lasaña.description: Sponge cake layers with cheese, bathed in house creams, a scoop of ice cream, dulce de leche, and dulce cortado jelly.

lasaña.title: TROPICAL
lasaña.description: Sponge cake layers with cheese, bathed in house creams, a scoop of ice cream, and a yellow fruit mix.

ensalada.title: URBAN
ensalada.description: Fresh fruit mix (600g) bathed in house cream, whipped cream, jelly with red berry chunks and sweet pineapple, cheese, condensed milk, cookie, and 2 scoops of ice cream (180g).

ensalada.title: WILD
ensalada.description: Fresh fruit mix (1100g) bathed in house cream, whipped cream, jelly with red berry chunks and sweet pineapple, cheese, condensed milk, cookie, and 4 scoops of ice cream (360g).

copasyhelados.title: FRUITY ICE CREAM
copasyhelados.description: 2 scoops of ice cream, fresh fruit mix, house cream, jelly with red berry chunks, condensed milk, and wafer roll.

copasyhelados.title: COCOA TRADITION
copasyhelados.description: 2 scoops of ice cream, chocolate sauce, chocolate bubbles and chips, condensed milk, wafer roll, cherry, and whipped cream.

copasyhelados.title: CHEESE SUNDAE
copasyhelados.description: 2 scoops of ice cream, cheese, dulce de leche, condensed milk, chocolate sauce, wafer roll, and whipped cream.

copasyhelados.title: PACIFIC SUNDAE
copasyhelados.description: Vanilla ice cream, coconut jelly, dulce cortado, cheese, condensed milk, wafer roll, and whipped cream.

copasyhelados.title: SUNDAE
copasyhelados.description: Vanilla ice cream with a jelly of your choice: (strawberry, dulce de leche, pineapple, red berries, chocolate, dulce cortado, coconut jelly), wafer roll, condensed milk, and whipped cream.

copasyhelados.title: PRIMATY SUNDAE
copasyhelados.description: Rice pudding base, 1 scoop of ice cream, jelly with red berry or pineapple chunks, condensed milk, dulce de leche, crushed peanuts, and wafer roll.

copasyhelados.title: ORIGIN SUNDAE
copasyhelados.description: 7 scoops of ice cream, brownie, meringue, dulce cortado, red berry jelly, cheese, chocolate sauce and chips, blackberry sauce, condensed milk, dulce de leche, wafer roll, cherry, and whipped cream.

copasyhelados.title: HAWAII SUNDAE
copasyhelados.description: 2 scoops of ice cream, yellow fruit mix (Mango, sweet pineapple, peaches, passion fruit), condensed milk, wafer roll, and whipped cream.

copasyhelados.title: LULO DELIGHT
copasyhelados.description: Vanilla ice cream, bathed in abundant lulo pulp, condensed milk, wafer roll, and whipped cream.

copasyhelados.title: OREO SUNDAE
copasyhelados.description: 1 scoop of ice cream, Oreo cookies, chocolate sauce, dulce de leche, and whipped cream.

copasyhelados.title: BANANA SPLIT
copasyhelados.description: 3 scoops of ice cream, double banana, red berry jelly, chocolate sauce, condensed milk, wafer roll, cherry, and whipped cream.

copasyhelados.title: CHEESY BANANA
copasyhelados.description: 3 scoops of ice cream, double banana, cheese, red berry jelly, sweet pineapple, chocolate sauce, condensed milk, whipped cream, cherry, and wafer roll.

copasyhelados.title: AFFOGATO
copasyhelados.description: 1 scoop of vanilla ice cream mixed in a delicious espresso, whipped cream, cookie, chocolate sauce, and dulce de leche.

copasyhelados.title: COFFEE FRAPPÉ
copasyhelados.description: A perfect blend of ice, coffee, ice cream, and milk, accompanied by a wafer roll and whipped cream.

carousel.parrafo-seccion1: This is an example paragraph to show how internationalization can be used in an application. Here you can add any text you want to translate into English. Remember that it's important to maintain language consistency throughout the application to provide a better user experience. You can include instructions, descriptions, or any other type of content that's relevant to your application. Internationalization makes your app accessible to a wider audience, which can increase its popularity and success. Don't forget to review the translation to ensure it's accurate and appropriate for your application's context!
carousel.parrafo-seccion2: This is descriptive text where you can explain your product, service, or any relevant information. The design is modern, clean, and adapts to different screen sizes.
carousel.parrafo-seccion2a: You can add more description about this image; the text should be short but clear and concise.
carousel.titulo-footer1: Thank you for visiting our application!
carousel.texto-footer1: We hope you enjoy exploring all the features...
